news.title: Hope Bay Approval Tests Agnico Eagle Mines Growth And Risk Balance
news.summary: Agnico Eagle Mines (NYSE:AEM) has approved construction and redevelopment of the Hope Bay underground gold mine in Nunavut, Canada. The project is positioned as a major expansion of the company’s Arctic mining footprint and its long term growth ambitions. Hope Bay is intended to support Agnico Eagle’s objective of increasing production by 20% to 30% over the next decade.
